_comment: T-177 — pinned gate environment, validated by `gate doctor` (a prerequisite of `make leptos-gates`). This exists so the editor CDP smokes stop depending on unpinned external state: chromium was a floating playwright cache, the toolchain floated, and there was no committed runner (t151_10 D-06). Update these values DELIBERATELY when bumping the toolchain or chromium, in the same commit as the bump.

chromium.note: Use the FULL chrome build (chrome-linux64/chrome) + --headless=new, NOT chrome-headless-shell. The shell ships a stubbed Skia SkFontMgr_FontConfigInterface whose per-character font fallback is a FATAL 'Not implemented' (SkFontMgr_FontConfigInterface.cpp:163) — the editor chrome triggers it, the renderer core-dumps, and the harness saw only a 130 s Runtime.evaluate hang. See cdp.rs find_chromium / launch and docs/website/EDITOR_GATE_RUNBOOK.md.
